columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Synchronous
columns.extraction_plan: The study focuses on "de novo (synchronous) metastatic prostate cancer". The entire study population consists of patients with synchronous metastases. Therefore, the results are inherently reported for this group. Answer: Y

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Metachronous
columns.extraction_plan: The study specifically includes patients with de novo (synchronous) metastatic prostate cancer. Patients with metachronous disease were not included. Therefore, the results are not reported based on this prognostic group.

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | High volume
columns.extraction_plan: The study reports results based on high-volume metastatic burden. The text states, "Median overall survival in patients with high metastatic burden improved from 3.47 years with SOC without abiraterone to 5.14 years when abiraterone was added...". Answer: Y

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Low volume
columns.extraction_plan: The study reports results based on low-volume metastatic burden. The text states, "As the data were not mature, no conclusive response in overall survival could be shown for patients with low metastatic burden". Answer: Y
